author: 艣r墨mad鈰卋haktived膩nta 奴rdhvanmah墨 mah膩r膩ja
verses:
ciramuktaga峁嚹乨峁泃a鈰卥膩myadhana峁乗ndhanadepsita鈰卾andita鈰卥alpatarum
tarur膩jita鈰卌inmaya鈰卍h膩ma鈰卌ara峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

kuliyaiva鈰卾ar膩ha鈰卻udh膩mavara峁乗nvarad膩yaka鈰卍eva鈰卾ik膩艣a鈰卥峁泃am
k峁泃ado峁鈰卻am奴ha鈰卼amohara峁嘺峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

na峁璦na鈰卲riya鈰卋h膩va鈰卥al膩drucira峁乗nciradh膩ma鈰卾ir膩jita鈰卬itya鈰卲rabhum
prabhup膩da鈰卹as膩vdhi鈰卥峁泃墨ratana峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

raghun膩tha鈰卬ibhaiva鈰卾ir膩gapara峁乗nparamojjvala鈰卹膩ga鈰卻um奴rtisuram
suranandita鈰卼arpita鈰卍eva鈰卾aram
pra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

prabhup膩da鈰卪anogata鈰卋h膩vadhara峁乗ndhara峁嚹媴ja岣峚ra峁単a鈰卾ih墨na鈰卬aram
narar奴pa鈰卾il膩sa鈰卾ibh膩va鈰卪aya峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

pra峁嘺t膩bhaya鈰卍膩yaka鈰卼墨rthapada峁乗npadasa峁伵況ita鈰卍墨na鈰卻amuttara峁嘺m
tara峁噊nmukha鈰卝墨va鈰卋hav膩pagama峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

pit峁沚h膩va鈰卲ar膩ya峁嘺鈰吪沬峁agati峁乗ngatimukti鈰卾idh膩yaka鈰吪浤乶ta鈰卾aram
vara峁嚹乬ata鈰卍urmati鈰吪浤乶tapada峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam

nigam膩nta鈰卻abh膩鈰卬avak墨rtidhara峁乗ndhara峁嚹玧ana鈰卼膩raka鈰単auraparam
parasevya鈰卲ad膩bja鈰卹ajastamaha峁乗npra峁嘺m膩mi ha ke艣ava鈰卲奴ta鈰卲adam
en_translation:
I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, which are the desired treasure of the eternally liberated souls, the wish-fulfilling tree worshiped by the giver of wealth (Kubera), and which wander in the spiritual abode adorned with trees.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, which revealed the excellent abode of Kuliya (Navadvipa) like the boar incarnation, and which destroyed the darkness of the mass of accumulated sins.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, which are beautiful with the art of loving emotions fond of dancing, which are the eternal Lord shining in the eternal abode, and which are the jewel of accomplishment in the ocean of Prabhup膩da's mellows.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, which are devoted to renunciation like Raghunatha Dasa, which are the divine form of the supreme blazing attachment (ujjvala-raga), and which are the best of gods, pleasing and satisfying the surfactant gods.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, which hold the internal mood of Prabhup膩da, which are a human form devoid of the dull enjoyments of the earth, and which are full of the ecstatic emotions of the pastimes of the human-like form.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, whose feet are a holy place giving fearlessness to the surrendered, which deliver the fallen souls who have taken shelter of them, and which remove the material existence of the living entities eager to cross over.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, who is the shelter of the disciples devoted to the mood of their father (guru), who is the best of the peaceful, arranging for their destination and liberation, and whose feet are the auspicious destination for the wicked who have surrendered.

I offer my obeisances to the sacred feet of Kesava, who holds new fame in the assembly of vedanta, who is devoted to Lord Gaura, the deliverer of the people of the earth. I bow to the dust of his lotus feet, which are worshipable by others.
